blended.narrative: Silver Mountain is looking at light snowfall over the next 48 hours, with 2.8 inches of wet, heavy snow expected. Snow levels around 3,535 ft. The 14-day outlook shows 11 inches total.

daily_summary.narrative: Friday: 2.7" of snow, highs of 38°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.
Saturday: 2.6" of snow, highs of 38°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.
Monday: 2.0" of snow, highs of 45°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.

recent_conditions.narrative: No new snow in the past 48 hours. Base has been melting — down 3" over the past week. Current depth: 30".
